// FeatureToggles: Reading order: below this line, every // key is documentation; the next block lists real settings in the same order (toggles and MaxSpecCredits, then each named section object). Each Enable* flag turns one QOL Harmony patch group on or off — false = vanilla ACE for that area only; other features stay as configured.
// EnableAnimations: MotionTable length overrides per MotionCommand (Animations.AnimationSpeeds; {} = vanilla) and configurable delay between each /die speech step.
// EnableAugmentations: Override augmentation type caps (Augmentation.MaxAugs) and optional IgnoreShared* so attribute or resist augs ignore ACE shared-group caps.
// EnableDefaults: When true, default values in the Defaults object apply the first time a listed property is set on a player who had no stored value yet (e.g. new or migrated chars).
// EnableFellowships: Raises max fellowship size for this mod’s invite logic, XP share (flat or per-size table), /fship bulk invite, optional busy bypass, StopAtMaxFellowshipInvite.
// EnablePermanentObjects: World objects marked with the Permanent fake property survive landblock unload without inventory wipe.
// EnableRecklessness: Replaces ACE Recklessness damage scaling with a power-bar window (PowerLow/PowerHigh) and trained/specialized damage rating bonuses configured in the Recklessness object below.
// EnableTailoring: Allow society armor as tailoring source/target (removes ACE restriction).
// EnableVendorsBuyEverything: Vendors accept buy/sell on item types they would normally refuse.
// EnableQuestgiverAuras: Equip quest-giver NPCs (creatures with StampQuest/InqQuest emotes) with an Aegis visual; WCID is QuestgiverAuras.AegisWcid.
// EnableStackable: Raise stack limits and enable stacking for selected WeenieTypes (books, keys, etc.) per the Stackable object.
// EnablePetAttackSelected: Pet attacks match the player’s selected target where applicable.
// EnablePetMessageDamage: Route or label combat messages involving pets.
// EnableSummonCreatureAsPet: Summon-creature spells can create pets with QOL pet rules.
// EnablePetSummonMultiple: Allow multiple pets when the pet patches allow it.
// EnablePetExShareDamage: Share damage between player and PetEx pet per that feature’s rules.
// EnableOfflineSwear: Chat command /swear and related allegiance auto-accept behavior.
// EnablePortalsStripNoRecall: When a portal spawns, clear PortalBitmask.NoRecall on its PortalBitmask so secondary portal recall and tie behavior can use that destination.
// PortalsStripNoRecallBlockedPortalWcid: Blocklist: portal WeenieClassIds that keep NoRecall (strip skipped). Empty = all portals get strip when EnablePortalsStripNoRecall is true.
// EnableFullKillXpPerDamager: Each damager earns full creature kill XP and luminance (not split by damage %). Off by default.
// EnableGiveNpcSingleFromStack: DEPRECATED: replaced by EnableNpcStackTurnIn. Kept for backward compatibility.
// EnableLootEconomyControl: Reduce loot value and amount to help reign in the pyreal economy. LootValueMultiplier scales item values; LootAmountReduction reduces drop count by percentage.
// LootValueMultiplier: Multiplies loot item values (0.1 = 10% of original value, 0.01 = 1%). Applied after generation to all loot items.
// LootAmountReduction: Percentage of loot drops to remove (0.7 = remove 70% of drops, keeping 30%). Values >1.0 add extra loot (WIP).
// EnableLootAmountBoostWIP: WIP: Enable multiplier >1.0 for extra loot drops. Not fully implemented yet.
// EnableTownNetworkToll: When true, Town Network–matched portals debit banked pyreals (see TownNetworkToll); insufficient funds can block or drain all bank per InsufficientFundsMode.
// MaxSpecCredits: Total specialisation credits a player may spend. Vanilla cap is 70. Use 9999 for effectively unlimited.
// Animations: DieSeconds: seconds between each /die broadcast speech step (not MotionTable; 0 = minimal delay). AnimationSpeeds: quoted MotionCommand names → seconds (0 = skip). Shipped preset is all zeros (instant). Use {} for vanilla motion-table lengths. Inside Animations: // lines first, then values (same order).
// Defaults: Four dictionaries: keys are ACE property enum names (PropertyInt64, PropertyInt, PropertyFloat, PropertyBool). Values apply only on first assignment when the player had no prior stored value. Empty {} means no defaults for that type. Inside Defaults: // lines first, then values (same order).
// Fellowship: SendDetails, MaxMembers, StopAtMaxFellowshipInvite, IgnoreBusy, OverrideSharePercent, FlatSharePercent, SharePercent table, DefaultShare. Inside Fellowship: // lines first, then values (same order).
// Recklessness: Power bar window (PowerLow/PowerHigh) and damage rating bonuses while Recklessness is active (trained vs specialized). Inside Recklessness: // lines first, then values (same order).
// Augmentation: IgnoreSharedAttribute / IgnoreSharedResist relax ACE group caps. MaxAugs merges per-type caps at startup. Inside Augmentation: // lines first, then values (same order).
// QuestgiverAuras: Visual aura for creature quest-givers; AegisWcid must be a valid item WCID. Inside QuestgiverAuras: // lines first, then values (same order).
// Stackable: MaxStackSize: stack cap for whitelisted items. StackableWcids: explicit WCID whitelist — only items in this list receive stacking behavior.
// TownNetworkToll: Bank PropertyInt64 for pyreals, level-based fees, Loremaster QP discount (FakeFloat.QuestBonus), portal matching. Inside TownNetworkToll: // lines first, then values (same order).
// EnableFacilityHub: When true: successful Facility Hub Portal Gem (WCID 49563) portal summons increment AchievementUnlocked FacilityFrequenter; /fac teleports to the gem's linked hub after unlock.
// EnableDpsDetailed: When true: /dps detailed toggles extra System lines after your melee/missile hits (DamageEvent mods) and offensive spell hits (final damage + crit flags). Off in Settings = command explains disabled.
// FacilityHub: Stock ACE: FallbackCell + origin/rotation used for /fac when linked portal Destination is not readable as Position (defaults: Val Heel Facility Hub 2.0 @ 0x01300105). Set FallbackCell to 0 to require successful portal resolution only.
// EnableGiveNpcSingleFromStack: DEPRECATED: replaced by EnableNpcStackTurnIn. Kept for backward compatibility only.
// EnableNpcStackTurnIn: When true, NPC quest turn-ins respect full stack size. Rewards scale by stack count, bankable rewards auto-deposit via LeyLineLedger, and equipment rewards check main-pack space.
// NpcStackTurnIn: Bulk quest turn-in settings. StackableQuestWcids: items that can be bulk-turned-in. AutoBankLllRewards: deposit bankable rewards to LeyLineLedger. CheckPackSpaceForEquipment: block turn-in if main pack too full.
// VendorLootRotationMinutes: Target minutes between stock refreshes on approach. Effective wait = min(this, VendorLootCooldownMinutes), each floored at 1.
// VendorLootItemsPerCategoryMin: Per equipment MerchandiseItemTypes bit, minimum items per rotation batch.
// VendorLootItemsPerCategoryMax: Per equipment MerchandiseItemTypes bit, maximum items per rotation batch.
// VendorLootLowStatMode: Skip heavy stat scaling and vendor imbue rolls on rotated stock.
// VendorLootSalvageOnRotation: Add random salvage bags when vendor sells Misc or Containers.
// VendorLootCooldownMinutes: Second cap on minutes between rotations (same vendor). Effective = min(RotationMinutes, CooldownMinutes).
// VendorTierWcidMap: Maps vendor WeenieClassIds to loot tiers (1-8). Starter towns default to tier 1.
// VendorTierLandblockMap: Landblock decimal IDs to tier. Holtburg 43442, Shoushi 56914, Yaraq 32100 starter curve.
// DefaultVendorTier: Default loot tier for vendors not in any map. 1-2 = starter, 3-5 = mid, 6-8 = endgame.
// VendorLootMagicItemPercent: After Caster equipment batch: percent of that batch size as extra MagicItem-category pulls. 0 = none.
// VendorLootMundaneItemPercent: MundaneItem pulls scaled by category count; requires Food, Misc, or TinkeringMaterial merch. 0 = none.

Animations.// DieSeconds: Seconds between each /die (HandleSuicide) speech step. 0 = minimal delay. Does not use MotionTable.
Animations.// Tier1Multiplier: Animation length multiplier for Achievement Tier 1 players (0.5 = half vanilla for listed motions). Tier 2+ get 0 (instant) per AnimationSpeeds. Tier 0 gets vanilla.
Animations.// AnimationSpeeds: Tier 2+ players: seconds per motion (0 = instant). Tier 1 players multiply vanilla by Tier1Multiplier. Tier 0 = vanilla. Quoted MotionCommand names.

Defaults.// Int64Defaults: Map PropertyInt64 name → default long. Example: MaximumLuminance for first-time luminance storage.
Defaults.// IntDefaults: Map PropertyInt name → default int on first assignment.
Defaults.// FloatDefaults: Map PropertyFloat name → default number on first assignment.
Defaults.// BoolDefaults: Map PropertyBool name → default bool on first assignment.

Fellowship.// SendDetails: On invite, send fellowship name and resulting XP share % to inviter and recruit.
Fellowship.// MaxMembers: Target max fellowship size for this mod’s invite logic (ACE may enforce a separate cap).
Fellowship.// StopAtMaxFellowshipInvite: When true, /fship stops inviting once the fellowship reaches MaxMembers.
Fellowship.// IgnoreBusy: When true, skip busy checks and force-accept invites (useful for automated /fship).
Fellowship.// OverrideSharePercent: When true, every member uses FlatSharePercent; when false, XP share comes from SharePercent by member count (and DefaultShare for larger groups).
Fellowship.// FlatSharePercent: XP share fraction for all members when OverrideSharePercent is true. 1.0 = 100%, 0.5 = 50%.
Fellowship.// SharePercent: Used when OverrideSharePercent is false. Each key is fellowship member count (integer). Value is XP share fraction (0.0–1.0) for that size. If count exceeds all keys, DefaultShare applies.
Fellowship.// DefaultShare: XP share fraction when fellowship size is larger than the highest key in SharePercent. 0.0 = no share beyond the table.

Recklessness.// PowerLow: Attack power fraction below which Recklessness provides no bonus. Range 0.0–1.0.
Recklessness.// PowerHigh: Attack power fraction above which Recklessness provides no bonus (bar too high). Range 0.0–1.0.
Recklessness.// RatingTrained: Damage rating bonus when Recklessness is Trained (scaled down if Recklessness skill is below your active attack skill).
Recklessness.// RatingSpecialized: Damage rating bonus when Recklessness is Specialized (same skill scaling as trained).

Augmentation.// IgnoreSharedAttribute: When true, attribute augs ignore the shared attribute group cap so each type can stack toward its own MaxAugs limit.
Augmentation.// IgnoreSharedResist: When true, resist augs ignore the shared resist group cap.
Augmentation.// MaxAugs: Each key is an AugmentationType name (ACE enum). Value = max purchases for that type merged into AugmentationDevice.MaxAugs at startup. Omitted types keep ACE defaults. Strength through Self share one attribute cap unless IgnoreSharedAttribute is true. Resist* types share one resist cap unless IgnoreSharedResist is true.

QuestgiverAuras.// AegisWcid: WCID of the Aegis item equipped to quest-giver NPCs. Sanguinary Aegis: 23356=Blue, 23357=Green, 23358=Pink, 23359=Red, 23360=White. Golden Flame: 35982.
QuestgiverAuras.// DebugLogging: When true, logs a WARN line each time an aura Aegis is created and equipped. For troubleshooting only.

Stackable.// MaxStackSize: Maximum stack size assigned to whitelisted items (ACE max 65535).
Stackable.// WcidFile: Path relative to mod directory of the WCID groups file. Format: { "GroupName": [wcid, ...], ... }

TownNetworkToll.// EnableDynamicPricing: When true, toll fees scale with server economy and character level.
TownNetworkToll.// LevelScalingMaxMultiplier: Maximum level scaling multiplier at max level (default 3.0 = 3× at level 275).
TownNetworkToll.// BaseLevelMultiplier: Flat multiplier applied after all other calculations.
TownNetworkToll.// BankCashProperty: PropertyInt64 id for banked pyreals (default 39999; match LeyLineLedger / AutoLoot).
TownNetworkToll.// FeeBelow50Min: Minimum toll for characters below level 50.
TownNetworkToll.// FeeBelow50Max: Maximum toll for characters below level 50.
TownNetworkToll.// FeeAbove100Min: Minimum toll for characters above level 100.
TownNetworkToll.// FeeAbove100Max: Maximum toll for characters above level 100.
TownNetworkToll.// QpPerThousandForDiscountStep: Each full block of this much QuestBonus QP applies DiscountPercentPerStep (uncapped).
TownNetworkToll.// DiscountPercentPerStep: Fraction off per step (0.05 = 5% per 1000 QP at default step).
TownNetworkToll.// NameSubstring: Case-insensitive substring on portal Name or AppraisalPortalDestination.
TownNetworkToll.// Wcids: TN portal WeenieClassIds: 42852 Portal to Town Network, 43020 Town Network Portal Gem, 43065-43067 Portal to Town Network (Combined also uses NameSubstring).
TownNetworkToll.// LandblockIds: Optional landblock ids where portal stands (Combined).
TownNetworkToll.// ChargeMarketplaceRecall: Apply same toll to /market recall when true.
TownNetworkToll.// InsufficientFundsMode: 0=Block (cannot travel if bank < fee), 1=DrainAll (debit all bank if 0 < bank < fee).
TownNetworkToll.// ScarabWcids: WCIDs of scarabs that can be taken as toll payment.
TownNetworkToll.// TaperWcid: WCID of Prismatic Tapers that can be taken as toll payment.
TownNetworkToll.// MinScarabThreshold: Never take scarabs if it would leave fewer than this many remaining.
TownNetworkToll.// MinTaperThreshold: Never take tapers if it would leave fewer than this many remaining.
TownNetworkToll.// TaperTakePercentMin: Minimum percentage of tapers to take (inclusive).
TownNetworkToll.// TaperTakePercentMax: Maximum percentage of tapers to take (inclusive).
TownNetworkToll.// ScarabTakePercent: Percentage of chosen scarab stack to take (rounded up, minimum 1).

// EnableKillXpMessage: Append XP earned to the kill notification. See KillXpMessage for display options.

KillXpMessage.// ShowPercent: false = "(48 xp)", true = "(0.003%)" percentage toward next level.

// EnableBundleGive: Consume BundleSize items when giving ≥BundleSize of a stackable WCID to an NPC; multiply all emote rewards. Currency auto-deposits to bank.
// EnableVendorPriceInflation: Multiplies what vendors charge players. >1.0 inflates prices (e.g. 5.0 = 5× cost); <1.0 reduces prices (e.g. 0.5 = half off). SALE events apply a second multiplier on top of this for specific towns.
// EnableNoDeathDrops: When true, items never drop on death (including slippery/dropped-on-death items). Physical coins also do not drop. LeyLineLedger banked pyreals are unaffected.
